DataRequest.Name: Windows: Scheduled Task Deletion / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects scheduled task deletion events. Scheduled tasks are likely to be deleted if not used for persistence. Malicious Software often creates tasks directly under the root node e.g. \TASKNAME. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/builtin/security/win_security_scheduled_task_deletion.yml
DataRequest.DataSource: Windows Security Log via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Security-4699" AND ((task!="\\Microsoft\\Windows\\RemovalTools\\MRT_ERROR_HB") AND (task NOT REGEXP ".*\\Mozilla\\Firefox Default Browser Agent .*")) AND user NOT REGEXP "\$$"
